tasks.title: Requirement Brief template
tasks.sub: MV → Consultant. Fields: situation, pain point, business impact, urgency, constraints, LOB.
tasks.prompt: Design the Requirement Brief template for MV-OS

tasks.title: Solution Brief template
tasks.sub: Consultant → MV. Fields: problem statement, recommended workflow, rationale, implementation steps, expected outcome.
tasks.prompt: Design the Solution Brief template for MV-OS

tasks.title: Audit Finding template
tasks.sub: Auditor → Consultant. Fields: finding ID, severity, deviation, reference workflow, root cause, recurrence flag.
tasks.prompt: Design the Audit Finding template for MV-OS

tasks.title: Escalation Request template
tasks.sub: Any agency → Owner. Fields: trigger reason, options considered, recommendation, decision required.
tasks.prompt: Design the Escalation Request template for MV-OS

tasks.title: Execution Log format
tasks.sub: MV → Auditor. Checkpoint-based logging structure for project execution trail.
tasks.prompt: Design the Execution Log format for MV-OS

tasks.title: Cross-LOB coordination protocol
tasks.sub: How projects spanning Consulting + Software + Automation SI get owned and coordinated.
tasks.prompt: Design the cross-LOB coordination protocol for MV-OS

tasks.title: Audit severity classification system
tasks.sub: Criteria for Critical / Major / Minor / Observation — what qualifies each level per LOB.
tasks.prompt: Design the audit severity classification system for MV-OS

tasks.title: Workflow change approval thresholds
tasks.sub: What makes a workflow change Major vs Minor? Who approves each type?
tasks.prompt: Define workflow change approval thresholds for MV-OS

tasks.title: Consulting LOB skill standards
tasks.sub: Deliverable quality standards, feasibility study format, lean workshop SOP.
tasks.prompt: Define skill and deliverable standards for Machine Vision Consulting LOB

tasks.title: Software Dev LOB skill standards
tasks.sub: Code review criteria, reusable service guidelines, smart manufacturing solution architecture standards.
tasks.prompt: Define skill and deliverable standards for Machine Vision Software Development LOB

tasks.title: Automation SI LOB skill standards
tasks.sub: PLC/SCADA naming conventions, electrical design checklist, commissioning SOP.
tasks.prompt: Define skill and deliverable standards for Machine Vision Automation SI LOB

tasks.title: Fill in human team roster
tasks.sub: Add names and roles to the Team Structure table in the project instructions.
tasks.prompt: Help me fill in the MV-OS human team roster

tasks.title: Owner reporting cadence
tasks.sub: How often does the Owner receive an Audit Report? What format and scope?
tasks.prompt: Design the Owner reporting cadence and format for MV-OS

tasks.title: Workflow library structure
tasks.sub: Where approved SOPs live, how they are versioned, and how agents reference them.
tasks.prompt: Design the workflow library structure for MV-OS

tasks.title: Project memory conventions
tasks.sub: Standard format for [OPEN ITEM] tracking, version labeling, and session handoff notes.
tasks.prompt: Define project memory and session handoff conventions for MV-OS

tasks.title: Machine Vision org chart
tasks.sub: Internal structure: Owner, LOB leads, team members by domain. Shows reporting lines.
tasks.prompt: Build the Machine Vision internal org chart for MV-OS

tasks.title: Consultant agency structure
tasks.sub: Who designs, who reviews, how workflow decisions are made internally.
tasks.prompt: Design The Consultant agency internal structure for MV-OS

tasks.title: Auditor agency structure
tasks.sub: Who audits which LOB, how findings are reviewed before issuance, escalation path.
tasks.prompt: Design The Auditor agency internal structure for MV-OS

tasks.title: Cross-agency authority map
tasks.sub: Single diagram showing all three agencies + Owner with authority lines and document flows.
tasks.prompt: Build the cross-agency authority map for MV-OS

tasks.title: Machine Vision orchestrator design
tasks.sub: AI agent sub-architecture for execution, project tracking, client comms across 3 LOBs.
tasks.prompt: Design the Machine Vision AI orchestrator sub-architecture for MV-OS

tasks.title: Consultant orchestrator design
tasks.sub: AI agent for workflow design, process analysis, SOP authoring, knowledge synthesis.
tasks.prompt: Design The Consultant AI orchestrator sub-architecture for MV-OS

tasks.title: Auditor orchestrator design
tasks.sub: AI agent for compliance checking, deviation detection, finding issuance, report generation.
tasks.prompt: Design The Auditor AI orchestrator sub-architecture for MV-OS

tasks.title: Inter-agent communication spec
tasks.sub: How the three orchestrators pass documents to each other. Format, triggers, acknowledgement.
tasks.prompt: Design the inter-agent communication specification for MV-OS orchestrators

tasks.title: Human-in-the-loop integration points
tasks.sub: Where and how human team members review, approve, or override AI agent outputs.
tasks.prompt: Design the human-in-the-loop integration points for MV-OS AI agents

tasks.title: MV-OS owner dashboard
tasks.sub: Owner-facing view: agency status, open findings, recent briefs, escalation queue.
tasks.prompt: Design the MV-OS owner dashboard UI concept

tasks.title: Requirement Brief submission UI
tasks.sub: Form for MV team to raise a new requirement and send it to The Consultant.
tasks.prompt: Design the Requirement Brief submission UI for MV-OS

tasks.title: Audit finding review UI
tasks.sub: Auditor-facing interface for logging deviations, setting severity, routing to Consultant.
tasks.prompt: Design the Audit Finding review UI for MV-OS

tasks.title: Workflow library browser
tasks.sub: Interface for browsing, versioning, and referencing approved SOPs and workflows.
tasks.prompt: Design the workflow library browser UI for MV-OS

tasks.title: Mobile status view
tasks.sub: Lightweight view for team members on-site to check current project status and open items.
tasks.prompt: Design the mobile status view UI for MV-OS field team members
